Summary: The Piano Black PSP was the original launch model of Sony's first handheld console. It introduced console-quality gaming, multimedia playback and UMD discs in a portable form factor.
The Ceramic White PSP was one of the earliest official colour variants, offering the same hardware as the launch model in a bright white finish.
The Pink PSP was released to broaden the handheld's appeal with a vibrant official colour option while retaining identical hardware.
The Silver PSP featured a metallic finish and became one of the most popular official PSP colour variants.
The Gold PSP offered a premium metallic finish and was released in selected regions as an official retail colour.
The Blue PSP introduced another official colour option while maintaining full compatibility with the PSP ecosystem.
The PSP Slim redesigned the original PSP with a lighter, slimmer body, video-out support and increased memory while maintaining compatibility with existing games.
The Ice Silver PSP Slim was a popular metallic finish for the redesigned PSP-2000 hardware.

Edition Name: PSP Slim God of War: Chains of Olympus
Official Name: Sony PSP God of War Entertainment Pack
Summary: Released alongside God of War: Chains of Olympus, this official limited edition PSP featured a striking red finish and themed bundle contents.

Edition Name: PSP Slim Final Fantasy VII: Crisis Core
Official Name: Sony PSP Crisis Core Final Fantasy VII Edition
Summary: This limited edition PSP celebrated the release of Crisis Core: Final Fantasy VII with exclusive artwork and branding.
The PSP-3000 introduced an improved display and built-in microphone. Pearl White was one of its most recognizable retail colour variants.
Vibrant Blue was an official PSP-3000 colour option featuring the updated handheld hardware.
Mystic Silver was an official PSP-3000 finish available in multiple regions.
The PSP go introduced a compact sliding design and downloadable games, eliminating the UMD drive in favour of digital distribution.
The Pearl White PSP go offered the same digital-only handheld in a clean white finish.
